item.title: Probiotics for ulcerative colitis: mechanisms, therapeutic advances, and emerging strategies.

item.title: Integrative Mendelian randomization and experimental validation prioritize KLF4 in the gut microbiota-pyroptosis-barrier axis of ulcerative colitis.
